'''Tallaan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Freeworlds Territory]] at the confluence of the [[Giju Run/Legends|Giju Run]], the [[Procopian Shipping Lane]], and the [[Shapani Bypass]]. It was best known for its [[Starship/Legends|starship]] production.

Tallaan was a voting member of the [[League of Tapani Freeworlds]].

==Culture==
Tallaan's population was very independent-minded, and treated neighboring nobles and others with inherited titles with a polite courtesy at best. They also took offense to the suggestion that their world gained its wealth solely due to its position on intercepting shipping lanes, preferring to credit their world's success on its peoples' strong work ethic.

Tallaan had a large number of temporary inhabitants, who lived on the planet part of the year to manage trades and transfer cargo. Tallaan had a large alien population, and there were many enclaves on the planet where aliens gathered to live among their own kind. This contributed to the vibrant culture of Tallaan, which was a good place to immerse oneself in, for example, [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] cuisine.

==Government==
Tallaan's government consisted of the Trade Commission, a council which elected one of its own as First Executive to lead the planet. While on paper the council members represented the people of their electorate, they most often spent their time and energies seeing to the needs of the various corporate interests in their respective communities. The Ministry of Orbital Commerce was widely considered the most powerful administration on Tallaan due to it overseeing the orbital stations, shipyards, and the millions of financial transactions associated with them each day, such as the massive portion of Tallaan's dockyards leased by the [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferran]] government to inspect transported bacta, which by law could not be done in Thyferran space.

==Military==
As the most powerful and strategically-placed system in the [[Freeworlds Territory]], Tallaan accordingly had the largest planetary military in the sector, and indeed had one of the largest planetary navies in the entire [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies Region]]. Tallaan contributed the largest number of vessels and units to the [[Freeworlds Common Navy]]. During the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] it consisted of twelve [[Tapani-class assault frigate|''Tapani''-class assault frigates]] and two [[Tapani-class carrier|''Tapani''-class carriers]], each with a standard complement of 40 [[Manta-class assault starfighter|''Manta''-class assault starfighters]]. Backing these up were numerous smaller vessels including [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]], and [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]]. Its [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] fleet also included [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s, [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]].

==Economy==
Tallaan derived most of its economy from trade, being situated at the intersection of several important [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]]. It was the most active trading world in the sector. It also had prominent mid- and high-tech industries of its own. Tallaan hosted several prominent spaceship manufacturing firms (including the [[Tapani Starship Cooperative]]) as well as companies that made vehicles such as tractors and transports, and repulsorlift vehicles such as [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]]. Since Tallaan was able to obtain raw [[Ore/Legends|ore]] at very low prices, its goods could be manufactured and sold far under standard galactic prices. Though there were superior and better-established brands around, Tallaani vehicles were popular in the Colonies and [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] because of the low prices and high quality.

==History==
Tallaan was a prime manufacturer of starships throughout the centuries of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] rule and retained its facilities during the reign of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The Empire and the Tallaan government worked together to maintain system security, but the arrangement was not well-liked by Tallaan patriots.

After the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the ''[[New Order Progressive]]'' reported that [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] and his staff died in a shuttle accident at the [[Tallaani Shipyards]] here, rather than over [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]].

Tallaan was also the home to the [[1st Tapani Assault Battlegroup]].

The planet was not attacked by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]], and, following the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] made his headquarters there, protecting the sector while operating independently until a decisive [[Battle of Ebaq|engagement]] at [[Ebaq 9]].

Ships from Tallaan were used in various engagements leading up to the end of the Yuuzhan Vong War, particularly around the time of the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Tallaan was developing and manufacturing warships for the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] government, to be used in the Confederation's [[Second Galactic Civil War|war]] against the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. During the course of the war, Tallaan, along with the rest of the Tapani Sector, joined the Confederation.
